title: ESP32-C3 vbat monitor
transcriptTail:
P32 ADC limits (usually safe up to ~2.6-3V directly, though we will compensate the calculation based on 3.3V scaling for typical ESP32 ADC setups).
*   The ESP32-C3 firmware declares a task polling this pin (`ADC1_CH0` on `GPIO0`) every 1s.
*   It multiplies the returned raw count by `3300/4095` to get measured millivolts on the divider node, and scales back up by a factor of 3 for the total battery voltage.
Initial 6V battery monitor with ESP32-C3 and firmware task

xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="esp32_batt_monitor">
  <metadata>
    <title>ESP32-C3 Battery Monitor</title>
    <description>6V battery monitored by ESP32-C3 ADC via a resistor divider, with 3.3V LDO for MCU power.</description>
    <author>AIR</author>
    <created_at>2025-01-01T00:00:00Z</created_at>
  </metadata>
  <nets>
    <net id="gnd" role="ground"/>
    <net id="v3v3" nominal_voltage="3.3V" role="power"/>
    <net id="vbat" nominal_voltage="6V" role="power"/>
    <net id="vbat_sense" role="analog_signal"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="BAT1" type="voltage_source">
      <value>6V</value>
      <pin name="p" net="vbat"/>
      <pin name="n" net="gnd"/>
    </component>
    <component id="R_BOT" type="resistor">
      <value>10k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="vbat_sense"/>
      <pin name="2" net="gnd"/>
    </component>
    <component id="R_TOP" type="resistor">
      <value>20k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="vbat"/>
      <pin name="2" net="vbat_sense"/>
    </component>
    <component id="U_LDO" type="ldo">
      <property name="vout" value="3.3V"/>
      <property name="iout_max" value="500mA"/>
      <property name="v_dropout" value="1.0V"/>
      <property name="iq" value="1mA"/>
      <pin name="in" net="vbat"/>
      <pin name="out" net="v3v3"/>
      <pin name="gnd" net="gnd"/>
    </component>
    <component id="U_MCU" part="ESP32-C3" type="mcu">
      <pin name="3V3" net="v3v3"/>
      <pin name="GND" net="gnd"/>
      <pin function="ADC1_CH0" name="GPIO0" net="vbat_sense"/>
    </component>
  </components>
  <analog>
    <subsystem id="analog_mon">
      <uses component="BAT1"/>
      <uses component="U_LDO"/>
      <uses component="R_TOP"/>
      <uses component="R_BOT"/>
      <probe id="probe_sense" net="vbat_sense" quantity="voltage"/>
    </subsystem>
  </analog>
  <firmware>
    <project framework="platformio" id="fw_main" language="cpp" target="U_MCU">
      <board>esp32-c3-devkitm-1</board>
    </project>
    <binding id="vbat_adc">
      <signal name="battery_voltage"/>
      <component ref="U_MCU"/>
      <peripheral>ADC1</peripheral>
      <channel>ADC1_CH0</channel>
      <net>vbat_sense</net>
    </binding>
    <task id="read_battery" target="fw_main">
      <period>1s</period>
      <read_adc binding="vbat_adc" into="raw"/>
      <convert expr="(raw * 3300 / 4095) * 3" into="mv"/>
      <log value="mv"/>
    </task>
  </firmware>
  <tests>
    <test id="test_battery_monitor">
      <setup/>
      <run duration="10ms"/>
      <assert_voltage max="3.4V" min="3.2V" net="v3v3"/>
      <assert_voltage max="2.1V" min="1.9V" net="vbat_sense"/>
    </test>
  </tests>
  <simulation_profiles>
    <profile default="true" id="sim_nominal">
      <backend type="ngspice"/>
      <include subsystem="analog_mon"/>
      <run test="test_battery_monitor"/>
    </profile>
  </simulation_profiles>
</system>
